result.sse_format: NOT OpenAI-compatible. Uses tRPC numbered-line SSE with JSON Patch operations.

event_15_types: message init: op=replace, path=/, value={full message object with role, content, chatId, id, generationStatus...}
content start: op=replace, path=/contentChunks, value=[{type:text, text:first_chunk}]

key_findings: Mistral uses tRPC numbered-line SSE, NOT standard SSE (data: ...)
Content delivered via JSON Patch: op=append on /contentChunks/0/text
chatId is required for all requests (generated on first message or via separate API)
mode=start for new chat, mode=append for follow-up messages
warning_implications: Cannot use standard SSE envelope template (data: format)
APF block response must mimic tRPC numbered-line format: 15:{json:{type:message,patches:[...]}}
Must include initial event 16:{json:{disclaimers:[]}} and final 8:null
ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED (from #257) confirms current block kills connection before any response is sent
